title: Rediculous Ore Generation
body:
Want to make Minecraft easier? This mod increases the size of ore veins to either 25 or 28 blocks per vein, including obsidian and bedrock. No need to search for them anymore! This is a direct copy of KingpvzYT’s Better Ore Generation mod, but with increased ore size. If you want a more natural ore generation, I highly suggest trying out the original mod: Better Ore Generation. However, if you’re here to ruin Minecraft’s ore generation completely, this is the mod for you. Expect issues like blocks having an ‘error’ texture on them temporarily, caused by the increased number size of ore generation. The original mod creator deserves more attention than me because he was the one who made this mod possible.

The difference between the 25 blocks and 28 blocks versions is that 25 is smaller, but it improves gametick performance and performance in general, including mobs/animals A.I. performance. On the other hand, 28 is larger, which may cause gametick performance to go down and performance in general. Additionally, 28 is greedier and has fewer visible stone blocks.
